matches.evidence: Prisma's `@updatedAt` decorator only fires when Prisma detects actual data changes in an `update` call. Passing an empty object `{}` as the data argument means Prisma has nothing to update, and `@updatedAt` will not trigger.
matches.reasoning: The review explicitly identifies that the empty data object in updateManyByCredentialId prevents the updatedAt timestamp from being updated, which is the exact same root cause described in the golden bug.

matches.evidence: It uses macOS-specific `sed -i ''` syntax (will fail on Linux)
matches.reasoning: The review explicitly identifies the same defect: macOS-specific sed -i '' syntax that will fail on Linux systems.
